configurations.name: Run iOS (Simulator)
configurations.command: cd example && npx react-native run-ios; exit

configurations.name: Run iOS (Device)
configurations.command: cd example && npx react-native run-ios --device; exit

configurations.name: Run Android (Emulator)
configurations.command: cd example && npx react-native run-android; exit

configurations.name: Run Android (Device)
configurations.command: cd example && npx react-native run-android --active-arch-only; exit
